summary: Full backend + frontend regression for Avero settings/pricing admin feature. 21/21 backend pytest pass (added 3 new settings tests). Frontend header nav renders 7 items in single row at 1024/1280/1440. Contact form submission, admin login, enquiry status transitions, and settings live-edit round-trip (₹3,999 → ₹4,999 → landing reflects → restore) all working end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: SettingsProvider fetches /api/settings only once on mount — after admin update, a full reload is needed on the landing page. This is by design (documented in review request) but consider adding polling or a manual 'live reload' hook for tighter feedback loops in future.

server.py is ~363 lines and still under the 700-line threshold, but blog_posts seed + settings model + routes are colocated. Consider splitting into routes/settings.py, routes/blog.py, routes/admin.py as it grows.
PATCH /api/admin/enquiries/{id} accepts raw dict for body — consider a pydantic StatusUpdate model to validate `status in {new,contacted,closed}`.
seed_data_creation: Test enquiries prefixed TEST_UI_<ts>. Settings temporarily set to ₹4,999 with a 'TEST UI announcement' item, then restored back to ₹3,999 / 5 default items — verified via GET /api/settings.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend has: GET /api/settings (public, 200 no-auth), GET/PUT /api/admin/settings (401 without JWT). SettingsProvider only reads once at app mount, so admin UI edits require full page reload of landing to see updates. Header nav has 7 items with whitespace-nowrap and stays on single row down to 1024px viewport. All data-testids present for header nav, pricing card, announcement bar, admin settings form (field-starting-price, announcement-add/remove-N, settings-save), admin dashboard tabs (section-tab-enquiries, section-tab-settings), and contact form. Contact form Budget options are '₹3,999 Starter / ₹5,000 - ₹10,000 / ₹10,000 - ₹25,000 / Premium Custom' — not the '₹5,000+' string mentioned in the review request; use role='option' first-match or exact label.

verification_matrix.enquiry_status_transitions_new_contacted: PASS (toasts shown, backend PATCH verified in pytest)
